last_cycle.reason:
Producer self-checks green; final-gate independently re-derived all 5 quality gates (go test 30/30 ok, go vet clean, go build 9.5MB binary, npm run build ships 193.87kB JS with
, playwright 79 tests/30 files) + 6 structural checks (old code gone except a gitignored macOS .DS_Store stub, 28 placeholder tests, minimal main.go, embed.go→ui/dist, 5 phase-01/task-N commits, 12/12 retained files) + 8 adversarial probes (binary smoke on :20128, /api/health 200, /assets/*.js 200, go.mod minimal 1 direct + 3 indirect, no internal/cli refs, no panics/TODOs in placeholders, embed_test.go is a real integration test). 4 phase-01 commits (6338148 task-1, 63124ba task-2, c900b55 task-3, e36a19c task-4).

Producer self-checks green; final-gate independently confirmed dist/index.html contains
(grep -c = 1), 29 modules transformed, 193.87kB JS / 60.95kB gzip, npm run build clean. Poll-then-act pattern handled the staged-deletion race cleanly: 60s wait on ui/src/ deletion, then `git rm -rf ui/src` herself when the Go skeleton had not finished. Commit 79db515 phase-01/task-1 (UI-side). Naming collision with go-skeleton's 6338148 (both phase-01/task-1) is documented as a plan-design prefix-allocation issue, not a duplication — contents are disjoint.

Independent verifier re-ran every gate from a fresh shell (binary + ui/dist deleted first to force a clean rebuild), produced 335-line Phase 1 Final Gate Report with full inline evidence. Verdict: PASS. 5/5 quality gates pass, 6/6 structural checks pass, 8/8 adversarial probes pass. Two non-blocking notes filed for Phase 2 planning: (1) macOS Finder re-creating the gitignored api/ dir, add `rm -rf api` to any clean-tree script on macOS hosts; (2) pre-existing WIP in ui/e2e/mocks and docs/superpowers/specs is out of Phase 1 scope, owner should clean or commit in a follow-up.

message_to_user:
Phase 1 Scaffolding PASS. 3/3 tasks accepted. The skeleton is real-host clean: go test 30/30 ok, go vet clean, go build 9.5MB binary, npm run build ships a 193.87kB UI bundle with the required
, playwright discovers 79 tests. Old api/internal/e2e_* code is gone (gitignored macOS .DS_Store stub leftover noted for Phase 2 cleanup); new internal/ has all 14 top-level + 14 provider subdir packages with doc.go + real _test.go placeholders. main.go is a 178-line fasthttp skeleton serving /api/health + SPA catch-all to embedded ui/dist. go.mod is minimal (1 direct + 3 indirect). 5 phase-01/task-N commits, two share the task-1 prefix (Go 6338148 vs UI 79db515) — plan-design note, not a duplication. Phase 2 is out of this plan's scope; let me know when to launch it.
